item.title: Bitcoiners - Live From Bitcoin Beach вАУ The Hidden Theology of Bitcoin: Is This GodвАЩs Design for Money?
item.description:
вАЛвАЛAre central banks stealing your soul? In this show we explore why fiat debasement is a moral crisis and why Biblical stewardship now requires Bitcoin. We dive deep into the ethics of money production, the "hidden theology" of the Bitcoin blockchain, and why the global Church is ditching the dollar to reclaim financial sovereignty.¬†

The modern church often ignores the financial rot that weakens its influence. Most organizations function within a reactive cycle. Effective Christian leaders now recognize that ignoring the collapsing financial landscape constitutes negligence. We explore the intersection of faith and finance to understand why so many NGOs admit that their global mission suffers under current funding systems. We analyze the inevitable consequences of currency debasement and discuss why apathy is no longer an option for responsible leaders.

Jordan Bush (@jmbushwrites) and Ahshuwah Hawthorne (@iAhsh) demonstrate how engineering rigor changes how ministry funds move across borders. They explain the function of their innovation lab where Bitcoin developers and ministry heads collaborate on building new solutions. They equip those on the front lines with the tools necessary to survive when the centralized banking system denies them access.

We have accepted managed decline as the natural order of things. We discuss why Bitcoin functions as sound money that restores a moral framework to our economy. This conversation serves as a necessary check for anyone who wants to understand how incentives dictate human behavior and societal outcomes.

Growing organizations often abandon the for-profit model as momentum builds. Restructuring as a non-profit arm of Brilliance Labs allows these groups to shift their focus from quarterly returns to long-term global impact. This move creates a foundation that enables ministries to hold value and sustain operations without fear of censorship or institutional overreach.

The religious establishment frequently dismisses Bitcoin despite its role as a vital asset for our time. These digital assets create a bridge for people to re-examine their values, low time preference, and legacy. This episode serves as a guide for those who believe the traditional financial world requires correction. Join us as we explore the future of stewardship.

вАФBitcoin Beach Team



Connect and Learn more about Thank God for Bitcoin:
Jordan Bush X: https://x.com/jordanbush
Ahshuwah Hawthorne X: https://x.com/iAhsh
TGFB X:¬† https://x.com/ThankGodforBTC
Brilliance Labs Web: https://brilliancelabs.org/
Web: https://tgfb.com/
IG: https://www.instagram.com/thankgodforbitcoin/
YT: ¬†@thankgodforbitcoin
¬† ¬† ¬† ¬† ¬†
Support and follow Bitcoin Beach:
X: https://www.twitter.com/BitcoinBeach
IG: https://www.instagram.com/bitcoinbeach_sv
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livefrombitcoinbeach
Web: https://www.bitcoinbeach.com

Browse through this quick guide to learn more about the episode:
00:00 вАФ Intro
01:59 вАФ Thank God For Bitcoin is essential for fighting fiat values.
13:29 вАФ Missionaries are the perfect leverage for Bitcoin adoption.
16:09 вАФ El Salvador proved the power of local Bitcoin economies.
25:41 вАФ We transitioned our Bitcoin project to a non-profit model.
33:00 вАФ Curated design labs destroy generic Bitcoin conferences.
35:59 вАФ We used Bitcoin design labs to orange-pill an Archbishop.
43:13 вАФ The Bitcoin rabbit hole forces a return to objective faith.
51:43 вАФ Bitcoin protocol incentives naturally enforce objective truth.
56:13 вАФ Christian NGOs are securing treasuries with Bitcoin adoption.

Live From Bitcoin Beach

]]>

item.title: State of Bitcoin with Brandon Keys вАУ I Spoke To Bitcoin's Most Connected Insider. He Told Me Everything with David Bailey - State of Bitcoin Ep. 237
item.description:
David Bailey reveals that 30-40 countries are secretly mining Bitcoin and 10+ nations are quietly building strategic Bitcoin reserves. The CEO of Nakamoto and Bitcoin Magazine joins Brandon to break down the Nakamoto-BTC Inc merger, why Bitcoin treasury companies are struggling, how the convertible note strategy backfired, what the Trump administration has actually delivered for Bitcoin, and why the nation-state Bitcoin race is bigger than anyone realizes.

David shares hard-won lessons from his first year as a public company CEO, explains why you can't out-Saylor Saylor, and reveals the asymmetric advantage of accumulating Bitcoin in a bear market. He also discusses why no government wants to announce their Bitcoin holdings вАФ and why that's about to change.

Guest: David Bailey вАФ CEO of Nakamoto, Founder of Bitcoin Magazine & BTC Inc

Twitter: @DavidFBailey

Timestamps:

0:00 - Nations Are Secretly Stacking Bitcoin

0:40 - The Nakamoto & Bitcoin Magazine Merger

3:37 - Bear Market Strategy: Plant Seeds Now, Harvest Later

8:00 - Bitcoin Treasury Companies: What Went Wrong

10:00 - The Saylor Problem: Why You Can't Copy Strategy

13:00 - Too Many DATs, Not Enough Value

16:00 - The $200M Convertible Note Mistake

21:14 - Can Treasury Companies Time The Market?

25:00 - Lessons From A First-Time Public Company CEO

35:00 - Trump Administration: A+ For Bitcoin

38:00 - 30-40 Countries Mining Bitcoin Right Now

42:00 - Why Governments Won't Announce Their Bitcoin

47:00 - Bitcoin Conferences: Vegas, Prague & Global Expansion

49:00 - Bitcoin Culture As A Force Multiplier

Bitcoin #DavidBailey #BitcoinMagazine #Nakamoto #BitcoinTreasury #Strategy #BTC #Trump #StrategicBitcoinReserve #NationStateBitcoin #GreenCandle

David Bailey reveals that 30-40 countries are secretly mining Bitcoin and 10+ nations are quietly building strategic Bitcoin reserves. The CEO of Nakamoto and Bitcoin Magazine joins Brandon to break down the Nakamoto-BTC Inc merger, why Bitcoin treasury companies are struggling, how the convertible note strategy backfired, what the Trump administration has actually delivered for Bitcoin, and why the nation-state Bitcoin race is bigger than anyone realizes.

David shares hard-won lessons from his first year as a public company CEO, explains why you can't out-Saylor Saylor, and reveals the asymmetric advantage of accumulating Bitcoin in a bear market. item.title: All In Bitcoin вАУ 030 Jameson Lopp: Why Privacy Is Losing & Bitcoin's Next War I All In Bitcoin w/CK
item.description:
рЯОЩпЄП Jameson Lopp: Why Privacy Is Losing & Bitcoin's Next War.

Privacy is breaking. Bitcoin is under pressure. And most people donвАЩt see it coming.

In this episode with Jameson Lopp, we go deep into the reality behind digital privacy, online attacks, and the growing tensions inside Bitcoin.

Jameson explains the real reasons behind his swatting, how misinformation and bots are reshaping online narratives, and why protecting privacy is becoming harder than ever. We also unpack the Knots vs Core debate and what it reveals about BitcoinвАЩs future.

This is a conversation about power, control, and responsibility in Bitcoin and beyond.

item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll вАУ State of Stablecoins 2026: Architecture, Power, and Risk
item.description:
In this solo episode of Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll, co-host Michael Blaschke steps away from the usual interview format to unpack a topic that is rapidly moving from crypto niche to systemic relevance: stablecoins. The episode is built around his newly published study with the FERI Cognitive Finance Institute, вАЬStablecoins: How Tokenized Money is Changing the Global Financial Architecture,вАЭ co-authored with Dr. Heinz-Werner Rapp.

This is not a hype-driven discussion about token prices. It is a deep dive into the monetary layer of the token economy: why tokenized assets need tokenized money, why stablecoins are emerging as the dominant settlement instrument, and why this shift matters for banks, regulators, corporates and policymakers.

Michael introduces the studyвАЩs two-pillar model: tokenized assets on one side, tokenized money on the other. He explains why a digital bond or tokenized fund remains incomplete if settlement still depends on slow legacy payment rails, limited business hours and correspondent banking chains. Stablecoins, in this view, are not just another crypto asset. They are the missing monetary infrastructure.

The episode also explores the scale of the market, the role of stablecoins in US Treasury demand, the geopolitical implications of dollar dominance, and the widening gap between EuropeвАЩs regulatory leadership and AmericaвАЩs strategic push. Michael examines the core risks institutions need to understand: depegs, reserve quality, intermediary fragility, regulatory shocks and run dynamics in 24/7 markets.

A major focus is EuropeвАЩs response under MiCA, including euro-denominated initiatives such as AllUnity and the Kivalis consortium. Looking ahead, the episode also connects stablecoins with the rise of agentic AI, asking what happens when autonomous systems begin to rely on programmable, always-on digital money.

This is a dense but practical episode for anyone working in institutional DLT, treasury, payments, compliance, digital assets or financial infrastructure. If you want to understand how tokenized money could reshape global finance, this is the episode to start with.

Blaschke & Rapp (2026) вАФ "Stablecoins: How Tokenized Money Is Changing the Global Financial Architecture," published by the FERI Cognitive Finance Institute (the study that the episode is built around).

FERI Cognitive Finance Institute press release

Michael Blaschke on LinkedIn

Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll Website

Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll Telegram Channel Brunnermeier & Niepelt (2019) вАФ Referenced for the argument that private and public money can be economically equivalent, but only under specific conditions (equivalence breaks down when trust in the private issuer erodes).

Lyons & Viswanath-Natraj (2020) вАФ Analyzed the stablecoin peg mechanism and compared arbitrageurs to authorized participants in the ETF market.

Gorton & Zhang (Yale) вАФ Compared bond-based stablecoins (Tether, Circle) to the Wildcat Banks of 19th-century America, i.e., private money issuers backed by reserves with historically mixed results.

Ahmed & Aldasoro (BIS working paper, 2026) вАФ "Stablecoins and Safe Asset Prices" вАФ Empirically demonstrated that stablecoin inflows depress three-month US Treasury bill yields by 2.5 to 3.5 basis points (5 to 8 basis points during tight supply periods).

Diamond & Dybvig (1983) вАФ The classic bank run model showing that coordinated withdrawals can be individually rational even when the institution is fundamentally solvent; applied by Michael to the stablecoin context.

Relai*: Buy Bitcoin with RelaiвАФyou can do a one-time purchase or savings plan: Click here. Use the referral code "ROCK" to reduce transaction fees by 0.1% while supporting Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll.

Value4Value Podcast Streaming: Support our podcast by listening to our episodes on the Fountain Podcast App. This way, if you wish, you can support us "Value4Value" while listening to the podcast. You can find us on the Fountain Podcast App here: Click here

Disclaimer: The content of this podcast reflects the private opinions of the hosts, serves exclusively for general information purposes and does not constitute investment advice. Always remember: Do your own researchвАФinform yourself before making any investment decisions, such as buying Bitcoin. First try to understand what Bitcoin is and how to store it. This podcast does not provide financial advice. Note that the co-hosts might be invested in crypto assets. Read more on our website: Click here

All links marked with "*" are affiliate links. If you use these links for purchase, the podcast receives a small share of the revenue without any additional costs to you. On the contrary, affiliate links often include discount promotions, so you can even save money. We would appreciate it if you use these links to support us. Thank you very much!

item.title: No Second Best - A Bitcoin Podcast вАУ Did the Federal Reserve Just Open the Door to Bitcoin?
item.description:
Jamie Dimon just went on national television to push back against Bitcoin and crypto legislation. Hours later, a Bitcoin exchange gained direct access to the Federal Reserve's settlement rails.

At the same time, Morgan Stanley filed for a spot Bitcoin ETF while geopolitical tensions escalated in the Middle East and Bitcoin surged.

This episode breaks down the growing conflict between the traditional banking system and the emerging Bitcoin financial infrastructure, and why the global monetary system may already be bending toward neutral, hard money.

]]>

News

вЧП Discussion of using nested MuSig2 in the Lightning Network (34:05)

item.title: Bitcoin Audible вАУ Read_941 - Number Go Down - Part 2
item.description:
"The idea that some authority can deduce the correct level of this balance is not merely wrong, it is not even wrong, it is methodologically incoherent. Asking for the 'correct' interest rate is like asking how much the color orange weighs."¬†

~¬†Allen Farrington & Sacha Meyers

What if deflation isn't the economic boogeyman we've been told to fear, but the very *signal* that progress is happening?

In Part 2 of¬†Allen Farrington and Sacha Meyers' brilliant essay, we dismantle the central myth of fiat economics вАУ that printing money creates growth вАУ and reveal why falling prices are the only honest measure that innovation has actually occurred. If the fiat prescription worked, where's the evidence? And why have central authorities never let us run the experiment?

Check out the original article: Number Go Down by¬†Allen Farrington and Sacha Meyers (Link: https://x.com/allenf32/status/2045477517201477686)

References from the episode

  • Part 1 of "Number Go Down" вАУ make sure you catch it before this one. (Link:¬†https://fountain.fm/episode/fLqds61ds9YbsnqGOkE8)
  • "Bitcoin is Venice" by Farrington & Meyers вАУ second edition announced for 2027. (Medium:¬†https://allenfarrington.medium.com/bitcoin-is-venice-8414dda42070)¬†(Amazon:¬†https://www.amazon.com/Bitcoin-Venice-Essays-Future-Capitalism/dp/B09TTTGT11)
  • "On the Manipulation of Money and Credit" by Ludwig von Mises. (Link:¬†https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=2212135)
  • And the companion Guy's Take coming soon on Bitcoin, Trust, and The Human Problem.

Host Links

  • вБ†Guy on Nostr вБ†(Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)
  • вБ†Guy on X вБ†(Link: https://twitter.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on Instagram (Link: https://www.instagram.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on TikTok (Link: https://www.tiktok.com/@theguyswann)
  • Guy on YouTube (Link: https://www.youtube.com/@theguyswann)
  • вБ†Bitcoin Audible on XвБ† (Link: https://twitter.com/BitcoinAudible)
  • The Guy Swann Network Broadcast Room on Keet (Link: https://tinyurl.com/3na6v839)

Check out our awesome partners!

  • Become sovereign, hold your keys, be censorship resistant with the Bitbox hardware wallet. Get 5% off everything in the store with code GUY (Link: https://bitbox.swiss/)
  • Get вБ†10% off the COLDCARDвБ† with code BITCOINAUDIBLE вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†(Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/coldcard)
  • Get 10% off the best Bitcoin board game in the world, HODLUP! Or any of the other great games from The Free Market Kids! Use code GUY10 at checkout for 10% off your cart! (Link: https://www.freemarketkids.com/collections/games-1)

вАЬBecause a tree in spring buds and comes greenly into leaf, are those leaves therefore the tree? If the newborn twigs and their leaves were all that existed, they would form a vague halo of green suspended in mid-air, but surely that is not the tree. The leaves, by themselves, are no more than trivial fluttering decoration. It is the trunk and limbs that give the tree its grandeur and the leaves themselves their meaning.

There is not a discovery in science, however revolutionary, however sparkling with insight, that does not arise out of what went before. 'If I have seen further than other men,' said¬†Isaac Newton, 'it is because I have stood on the shoulders of giants.вАЭ

~ Isaac Asimov

]]>

item.title: Thank God for Bitcoin вАУ To The Unknown Pod Episode 42: Bitcoin and A World At War
item.description:
In this episode, Jordan Bush and Ryan Finlay explore the complex intersections of global conflict, economic warfare, and Bitcoin's role as a resilient alternative in a world at war. They analyze recent Middle East tensions, the decline of the petrodollar, and how Bitcoin offers a form of financial sovereignty amidst geopolitical chaos.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin News Alerts | Daily BTC Macro Signal вАУ 2319: $10M Bitcoin - Buyers Are Absorbing All Supply
item.description:
Bitcoin just broke - not price, but supply.

With ETFs absorbing more Bitcoin than miners can produce and institutions accelerating accumulation, a structural supply shock is forming in real time. This episode breaks down why availability - not price - is becoming the defining variable in Bitcoin's next phase.

As demand continues rising and liquid supply disappears, price doesn't move gradually - it gaps higher.

This is how Bitcoin moves from thousandsвА¶ to millions.

For the full premium livestream experience with video, visit our Rumble at http://BitcoinNewsAlerts.net

]]>

item.title: BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast вАУ Bitcoin und Deutschland: Wo stehen wir und wo kann die Reise hingehen? #6 mit Larry
item.description:
Herzlich willkommen zum BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast(https://www.bitbucks.de)!

Heute haben wir einen besonderen Gast: Larry, bekannt als @B1tcoin3r auf X. Larry ist ein erfahrener Bitcoin-Experte, Vortragsredner und Workshop-Host. Dank seines weitreichenden Netzwerks in f√Љhrenden Positionen bringt er tiefgehende Einblicke in die aktuelle Bitcoin-Situation in Deutschland mit. Gemeinsam sprechen wir √Љber die deutsche Bitcoin-Politik, die Auswirkungen der neuen Regierung und die m√ґgliche Zukunft von Bitcoin in Deutschland.

Viel Spa√Я beim Zuh√ґren!

Zudem reden wir auch noch √Љber die Themen:

- Die aktuelle Bitcoin Lage in Deutschland (Adaption, Beliebtheit)

- L√ґsungen f√Љr eine Bitcoin Adaption

- Einfluss der Politik auf Bitcoin

- Ob Bitcoin die Politik √Љberhaupt braucht- Bitcoin und Unternehmen bzw. Start-Ups

- Wie viele Jahre es dauern wird, bis Deutschland Bitcoin als offizielles Zahlungsmittel einf√Љhrt

Viel Spa√Я beim Zuh√ґren!

Zudem reden wir auch noch √Љber die Themen:

- Die aktuelle Bitcoin Lage in Deutschland (Adaption, Beliebtheit)

- L√ґsungen f√Љr eine Bitcoin Adaption

- Einfluss der Politik auf Bitcoin

- Ob Bitcoin die Politik √Љberhaupt braucht- Bitcoin und Unternehmen bzw. Start-Ups

- Wie viele Jahre es dauern wird, bis Deutschland Bitcoin als offizielles Zahlungsmittel einf√Љhrt

- Bitcoin St√§dte Spiel: Errate die f√Љnf beliebtesten Bitcoin St√§dte weltweit

- Wie Bitcoin Larrys Leben ver√§ndert hat

- Glaskugel: Bitcoin Preis am Ende des Jahres 2025Podcast Folge auf Spotify:

item.title: VERIFIED by Bitcoin Suisse вАУ Can Bitcoin Escape the Quantum Black Hole?
item.description:
Is quantum computing Bitcoin's biggest hidden risk - and is anyone actually solving it? In this episode, Dominic Weibel and Luca Gnos sit down with Charles Edwards, founder of Capriole Investments, to break down how geopolitics, macro conditions, and quantum risk are shaping Bitcoin's next move. Edwards shares his onchain valuation tools pointing to a ~43% discount from fair value, explains why institutions now dominate Bitcoin's demand structure, and makes the case that quantum risk is already suppressing price - with a potential major repricing on the horizon within 12вАУ24 months.

]]>

item.title: 21Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast вАУ Aus der Banken IT in die Welt von Bitcoin - Harald Betz
item.description:
Folge #61 вАУ Ein Gespr√§ch √Љber Banken IT und Bitcoin B√Љcher

Harald Beetz ist seit fast 20 Jahren selbstst√§ndig in der Beratung f√Љr Banken und Rechenzentren. Angefangen als Banklehrling bei der Sparkasse, hat er fr√Љh den Wandel von Beratung hin zu reinem Vertrieb erlebt und sich auf IT-Projekte spezialisiert. In diesem Gespr√§ch erz√§hlt er, wie er von der Banken IT zu Bitcoin kam, warum er mit seiner Frau einen Roman √Љber Geld schrieb und wie er sich heute zwischen Beratung und Content rund um Bitcoin positioniert.


Du erf√§hrst,

  • wie Harald die Bankenwelt von innen erlebt hat,
  • welche Herausforderungen und Chancen es als IT-Berater gibt,
  • warum er Bitcoin zun√§chst wieder verkaufte und sp√§ter mit v√ґllig anderem Blick neu entdeckte,
  • wie aus einer Buchidee seiner Frau ein gemeinsames Projekt wurde
  • und welche unternehmerischen Lektionen er aus fast zwei Jahrzehnten Selbstst√§ndigkeit mitnimmt.


Kapitel:

  • 00:00 Begr√Љ√Яung und Vorstellung
  • 02:15 Vom Banklehrling zum IT-Berater
  • 07:40 Ver√§nderungen in der Bankenwelt seit den 2000er Jahren
  • 15:10 Einstieg in die Selbstst√§ndigkeit und erste Projekte
  • 22:05 Gescheiterte Produktidee und der Wechsel zur Beratung
  • 29:15 Erster Kontakt mit Bitcoin und die zweite Begegnung
  • 36:50 Der Roman √Љber Geld und Bitcoin
  • 44:20 Zukunft der Beratung im Banken- und Bitcoin-Umfeld
  • 49:00 Wichtigste Tipps f√Љr Vertrieb und Resilienz


Links:

Youtube: youtube.com/@MiesesGeld

Webseite: miesesgeld.de

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/haraldbetz


---

21 Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast

Hallo, mein Name ist Daniel Wingen und ich suche den Austausch mit anderen Unternehmern die in Bitcoin eine wichtiges Werkzeug f√Љr ihr Unternehmen sehen. Ich m√ґchte selbst lernen und andere dazu inspirieren sich mit Bitcoin im eigenen Unternehmen zu besch√§ftigen.

Hier kannst Du Teil der Community werden und mich kontaktieren:

Telegram Community: вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†t.me/B21FocusвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†¬†

Daniel auf X: вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†x.com/danielwingenвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†¬†

  • wie aus einer Buchidee seiner Frau ein gemeinsames Projekt wurde
  • und welche unternehmerischen Lektionen er aus fast zwei Jahrzehnten Selbstst√§ndigkeit mitnimmt.


Kapitel:

  • 00:00 Begr√Љ√Яung und Vorstellung
  • 02:15 Vom Banklehrling zum IT-Berater
  • 07:40 Ver√§nderungen in der Bankenwelt seit den 2000er Jahren
  • 15:10 Einstieg in die Selbstst√§ndigkeit und erste Projekte
  • 22:05 Gescheiterte Produktidee und der Wechsel zur Beratung
  • 29:15 Erster Kontakt mit Bitcoin und die zweite Begegnung
  • 36:50 Der Roman √Љber Geld und Bitcoin
  • 44:20 Zukunft der Beratung im Banken- und Bitcoin-Umfeld
  • 49:00 Wichtigste Tipps f√Љr Vertrieb und Resilienz


Links:

Youtube: youtube.com/@MiesesGeld

Webseite: miesesgeld.de

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/haraldbetz


---

21 Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast

Hallo, mein Name ist Daniel Wingen und ich suche den Austausch mit anderen Unternehmern die in Bitcoin eine wichtiges Werkzeug f√Љr ihr Unternehmen sehen. Ich m√ґchte selbst lernen und andere dazu inspirieren sich mit Bitcoin im eigenen Unternehmen zu besch√§ftigen.

item.title: Bald in Bitcoin вАУ Bald in Bitcoin - Folge 11: Warum Dein Geld leise weniger wird
item.description:
Viele Menschen haben heute das Gef√Љhl: рЯСЙ Das Geld reicht nicht mehr so wie fr√Љher.

Diese Folge geht genau dieser Beobachtung nach вАУ mit klaren Zahlen und einfachen Beispielen aus dem Alltag.

Das erwartet dich: Warum dein Wocheneinkauf teurer geworden ist Wie stark die Kaufkraft seit 2000 gesunken ist Warum die Geldmenge im System st√§ndig w√§chst Der einfache Zusammenhang zwischen Geldmenge und Preisen Warum das kein kurzfristiges Problem ist Bitcoin als m√ґgliches Gegenmodell Wichtige Gedanken aus der Folge:

рЯСЙ 100 вВђ im Jahr 2000 haben heute nur noch etwa 55вАУ65 вВђ Kaufkraft рЯСЙ Die Geldmenge im Euroraum hat sich in den letzten 20 Jahren mehr als verdreifacht рЯСЙ Mehr Geld im System f√Љhrt langfristig zu steigenden Preisen

Einordnung

Diese Folge ist keine Anlageberatung. Sie soll dir helfen, die Grundlagen unseres Geldsystems besser zu verstehen вАУ damit du fundierte eigene Entscheidungen treffen kannst.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Weekly Update вАУ Could Bitcoin Freeze Old Wallets? The BIP 361 Debate Explained
item.description: <![CDATA[In this episode of The Weekly, Graham and Alex break down one of the biggest new debates in Bitcoin: should old wallets be frozen to protect the network from a future quantum threat?They unpack BIP 361, the case for and against freezing legacy addresses, what it could mean for SatoshiвАЩs coins, and why this debate goes far beyond technology. At the core is a much bigger question: if Bitcoin can change its rules to protect itself, does it stop being the immutable, neutral monetary asset people thought it was?The episode also covers:Bitcoin miner capitulationwhether mining centralization is a real long-term threatthe KelpDAO exploitwhy DeFi increasingly feels broken for everyday usersWatch for sharp analysis on Bitcoin, crypto markets, and the narratives shaping the space.00:41 - Welcome and Introductions01:24 - Paris Blockchain Week Insights02:43 - Market Overview and Bitcoin's Position04:51 - Discussion on BIP361 and Quantum Threat08:41 - Debate on Bitcoin's Rule Changes11:16 - Opposition to Quantum Resistance Proposals13:12 - Philosophical Debate on Bitcoin's Future17:38 - Bitcoin Miners and Market Challenges22:30 - KelpDAO Hack and DeFi Crisis30:32 - Conclusion and Upcoming Topics]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Treasury Podcast вАУ Saylor's STRC Buy Could've Been BILLIONS Bigger | Strategy Mega-Buy Roundtable
item.description:
Parker White from Apyx reveals on the record that Strategy could've raised 50вАУ100% more during its recent STRC mega-buy вАФ and chose not to.

On this Bitcoin Treasuries roundtable, Tyler Rowe sits down with Alexandre Laizet (Capital B), Ryan Lane (Empery Digital), Parker White (Apyx / DFDV), and Soleil (True North) to unpack the $2B+ STRC raise, debate whether smaller Bitcoin treasury companies should sell Bitcoin to buy back shares trading under NAV, and share their price targets for Bitcoin's next all-time high.

Topics covered:

  • Parker's insider account of Strategy's STRC capacity
  • Bi-monthly dividend rollouts and the race toward daily income
  • Ryan Lane on Empery Digital selling Bitcoin to grow BTC per share
  • Alexandre on why French institutions now understand digital credit
  • Managing MNAV multiples as a smaller treasury company
  • Bitcoin's stability during the Iran-Israel-US conflict
  • Capital B's target of 42,000 Bitcoin by 2029
  • Lightning round: when does Bitcoin hit a new all-time high?

Follow the panel:Alexandre Laizet: вБ†https://twitter.com/@AlexandreLaizetвБ†Ryan Lane / Empery Digital: вБ†https://twitter.com/@EMPD_BTCвБ†Parker White: вБ†https://twitter.com/@TheOtherParkerвБ†_Soleil: вБ†https://twitter.com/@nithusezniвБ†

Special thanks to @hemi_xyz вАФ вБ†https://bit.ly/hemiXYZвБ†

вЪ†пЄП Not financial advice. Do your own research.рЯЯ† Stay Orange.

CHAPTERS:

00:00 Cold Open

02:34 Welcome & Intros To The Panel

07:22 Saylor Leaving Money On The Table w/ STRC ATM?

On this Bitcoin Treasuries roundtable, Tyler Rowe sits down with Alexandre Laizet (Capital B), Ryan Lane (Empery Digital), Parker White (Apyx / DFDV), and Soleil (True North) to unpack the $2B+ STRC raise, debate whether smaller Bitcoin treasury companies should sell Bitcoin to buy back shares trading under NAV, and share their price targets for Bitcoin's next all-time high.

Topics covered:

  • Parker's insider account of Strategy's STRC capacity
  • Bi-monthly dividend rollouts and the race toward daily income
  • Ryan Lane on Empery Digital selling Bitcoin to grow BTC per share
  • Alexandre on why French institutions now understand digital credit
  • Managing MNAV multiples as a smaller treasury company
  • Bitcoin's stability during the Iran-Israel-US conflict
  • Capital B's target of 42,000 Bitcoin by 2029
  • Lightning round: when does Bitcoin hit a new all-time high?

Follow the panel:Alexandre Laizet: вБ†https://twitter.com/@AlexandreLaizetвБ†Ryan Lane / Empery Digital: вБ†https://twitter.com/@EMPD_BTCвБ†Parker White: вБ†https://twitter.com/@TheOtherParkerвБ†_Soleil: вБ†https://twitter.com/@nithusezniвБ†

Special thanks to @hemi_xyz вАФ вБ†https://bit.ly/hemiXYZвБ†

рЯУК Track every Bitcoin treasury company at bitcointreasuries.netрЯТђ Questions for the roundtable? вБ†roundtable@bitcointreasuries.netвБ†

вЪ†пЄП Not financial advice. Do your own research.рЯЯ† Stay Orange.

CHAPTERS:

00:00 Cold Open

02:34 Welcome & Intros To The Panel

03:38 Apyx & The Implications Of STRC Dividends Going Semi-Monthly

07:22 Saylor Leaving Money On The Table w/ STRC ATM?

39:54 The Rise of Retail Investment and Accessibility

43:37 Market Dynamics and Treasury Management

item.title: Bitcoin Insights | Bitcoin Podcast mit Philipp 'PJAH' Hartmannsgruber вАУ #16 Im Auto nach El Zonte: Bitcoin in El Salvador mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich
item.description:
In dieser Episode spricht Philipp mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich im Auto auf dem Weg von San Salvador nach El Zonte √Љber ihre Eindr√Љcke aus El Salvador. Sie diskutieren die Bitcoin-Adoption, die Adopting Bitcoin-Konferenz, die Sicherheitslage, die allt√§gliche Nutzung von Bitcoin und die politische Situation unter Pr√§sident Bukele.


Wer ist Robin Seyr?

Robin Seyr ist Host vom t√§glichen Bitcoin Podcast.


Wer ist Ben Raich?

Ben Raich arbeitet mit Leidenschaft an vielf√§ltigen Projekten im Bitcoin-Space, um Bildung und Adaption von Bitcoin voranzutreiben. Sein Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Produktion hochwertiger Videopodcasts, dem Videoschnitt sowie journalistischen T√§tigkeiten.

item.title: Bitcoin Audible вАУ Read_941 - Number Go Down - Part 2
item.description:
"The idea that some authority can deduce the correct level of this balance is not merely wrong, it is not even wrong, it is methodologically incoherent. Asking for the 'correct' interest rate is like asking how much the color orange weighs."¬†

~¬†Allen Farrington & Sacha Meyers

What if deflation isn't the economic boogeyman we've been told to fear, but the very *signal* that progress is happening?

In Part 2 of¬†Allen Farrington and Sacha Meyers' brilliant essay, we dismantle the central myth of fiat economics вАУ that printing money creates growth вАУ and reveal why falling prices are the only honest measure that innovation has actually occurred. If the fiat prescription worked, where's the evidence? And why have central authorities never let us run the experiment?

Check out the original article: Number Go Down by¬†Allen Farrington and Sacha Meyers (Link: https://x.com/allenf32/status/2045477517201477686)

References from the episode

  • Part 1 of "Number Go Down" вАУ make sure you catch it before this one. (Link:¬†https://fountain.fm/episode/fLqds61ds9YbsnqGOkE8)
  • "Bitcoin is Venice" by Farrington & Meyers вАУ second edition announced for 2027. (Medium:¬†https://allenfarrington.medium.com/bitcoin-is-venice-8414dda42070)¬†(Amazon:¬†https://www.amazon.com/Bitcoin-Venice-Essays-Future-Capitalism/dp/B09TTTGT11)
  • "On the Manipulation of Money and Credit" by Ludwig von Mises. (Link:¬†https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=2212135)
  • And the companion Guy's Take coming soon on Bitcoin, Trust, and The Human Problem.

Host Links

  • вБ†Guy on Nostr вБ†(Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)
  • вБ†Guy on X вБ†(Link: https://twitter.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on Instagram (Link: https://www.instagram.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on TikTok (Link: https://www.tiktok.com/@theguyswann)
  • Guy on YouTube (Link: https://www.youtube.com/@theguyswann)
  • вБ†Bitcoin Audible on XвБ† (Link: https://twitter.com/BitcoinAudible)
  • The Guy Swann Network Broadcast Room on Keet (Link: https://tinyurl.com/3na6v839)

Check out our awesome partners!

  • Become sovereign, hold your keys, be censorship resistant with the Bitbox hardware wallet. Get 5% off everything in the store with code GUY (Link: https://bitbox.swiss/)
  • Get вБ†10% off the COLDCARDвБ† with code BITCOINAUDIBLE вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†(Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/coldcard)
  • Get 10% off the best Bitcoin board game in the world, HODLUP! Or any of the other great games from The Free Market Kids! Use code GUY10 at checkout for 10% off your cart! (Link: https://www.freemarketkids.com/collections/games-1)

вАЬBecause a tree in spring buds and comes greenly into leaf, are those leaves therefore the tree? If the newborn twigs and their leaves were all that existed, they would form a vague halo of green suspended in mid-air, but surely that is not the tree. The leaves, by themselves, are no more than trivial fluttering decoration. It is the trunk and limbs that give the tree its grandeur and the leaves themselves their meaning.

There is not a discovery in science, however revolutionary, however sparkling with insight, that does not arise out of what went before. 'If I have seen further than other men,' said¬†Isaac Newton, 'it is because I have stood on the shoulders of giants.вАЭ

~ Isaac Asimov

]]>

item.title: True Crime Bitcoin Podcast вАУ 5-Euro-Schraubenschl√Љssel-Attacke Episode 4
item.description:
Neben all der Sicherheit, die Bitcoin durch Kryptografie, Dezentralit√§t und Proof-of-Work bietet, bleibt der Mensch der gr√ґ√Яte Risikofaktor, sobald es zur Anwendung von Gewalt kommt. Kein Algorithmus der Welt kann gegen eine Waffe oder ein Messer sch√Љtzen вАУ zumindest nicht, wenn dadurch die Herausgabe eines Private Keys erzwungen werden soll.

Gemeinsam schauen wir uns an, wie dieses Szenario in den letzten Jahren zugenommen hat und welche spektakul√§ren F√§lle sich in verschiedenen Teilen der Welt auf der Jagd nach Bitcoin-Haltern bereits zugetragen haben. Aber ist das wirklich ein Grund zur Panik? Wir versuchen, die Grenze zwischen berechtigter Vorsicht und unn√ґtiger Hysterie zu ziehen.

V4V:
crime21@getalby.com
